{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Diamondscale meat
| introduced = cradle-05-ghostwater
}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Diamondscale meat]] can be used to strengthen [[Lindon]] and [[Orthos]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c16">''Ghostwater'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
